name: good-repo
description: A GitHub repository effectiveness skill for auditing and configuring repos for adoption, contribution, and trust.

scripts.validate: python3 -m json.tool package.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool evals/evals.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool evals/trigger-queries.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/marketplace.json >/dev/null && bash -n skills/good-repo/scripts/check-repo-readiness.sh && python3 -m py_compile skills/good-repo/scripts/audit-github-owner.py && python3 -m py_compile evals/run_eval.py && python3 -m py_compile evals/run_fixture_tests.py && npm run eval:validate && npm run eval:fixtures
